key_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Architectural precision meets financial clarity.
Emotion First: Controlled sophistication, credibility, and foresight.
Content is King: Every pixel serves the trade decision.
Negative Space: Generous breathing room (2-3x standard padding).
Contrast: Deep blacks vs. glowing data points.
anti_patterns: Rounded-xl corners (Use sharp or minimal rounded-sm).

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#C5A028] font-bold rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#333] text-white hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37] rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-[#262626] rounded-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333] text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-none h-12

charts.style: Minimalist, thin lines, glowing gradients for area charts, neon accents.

motion.fade_in: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}

hero_background.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay

ai_concept.usage: AI Copilot section background or accent

office_atmosphere.usage: About us or Contact section background

universal_guidelines: CRITICAL: Use .js or .jsx extension for all new React files. DO NOT use .ts or .tsx.
Dark Mode is the DEFAULT. Ensure 'dark' class is applied to the html/body tag.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless it is a subtle noise overlay.
Use uppercase tracking-widest text for labels and small headers.
Avoid rounded buttons. Use sharp edges or minimal rounding (2px).
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup global CSS variables in index.css to match the 'colors' section above. Force dark mode defaults.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Install necessary dependencies: framer-motion, recharts, lucide-react, sonner.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the Dashboard layout using the Bento Grid strategy defined in 'layout_strategy'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the AI Copilot Panel using a glassmorphic sidebar.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the Landing Page using the provided image assets and architectural typography.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure all forms (Login, Register, Contact) use the custom input styles defined.
